edges.description: Trigger creates the client profile record.
Trigger sets the business type.
Trigger seeds the URL list.
Trigger sets the success criteria from the template.
URL Discovery hands the curated list to the contract.
Template fills in default persona.
Template fills in default budget and thresholds.
Client profile is part of the audit plan input.
Persona feeds the audit plan.
URL list feeds the audit plan.
Success criteria feed the audit plan.
Plan goes to the queue manager.
Each page becomes a job for the workflow controller.
Failures escalate to retry and recovery.
Recovered jobs return to the controller.
Controller starts the browser agent.
Browser hands the live page to the overlay handler.
Clean page goes to screenshot capture.
Clean page goes to DOM and AX-tree extraction.
Browser triggers multi-viewport runs.
Each viewport re-runs screenshot capture.
Each viewport re-runs DOM/AX extraction.
First-paint screenshots feed the initial state.
First-paint structure feeds the initial state.
Initial state feeds the scroll explorer.
Initial state feeds the interaction explorer.
Scroll states go to the coordinator.
Interaction states go to the coordinator.
Selected states feed Page Understanding.
Screenshots fill the evidence library.
DOM and AX tree fragments fill the evidence library.
Scroll states contribute DOM evidence.
Interaction states contribute DOM evidence.
Annotator pulls from the screenshot library.
Annotator pulls element coordinates from DOM evidence.
Run config is pinned into the reproducibility snapshot.
All 30 rules feed the filter.
Page-type rule mapping feeds the filter.
Persona and funnel weights feed the filter.
Shortlisted rules go to Heuristic Evaluation.
Page Understanding sees the screenshots.
Page Understanding sees the DOM evidence.
Persona reaches Page Understanding.
Deep perception feeds Heuristic Evaluation.
Deep perception also feeds AI-Driven Discovery — the parallel path for issues outside the rule library.
Novel findings rejoin the pipeline at Self-Critique, like rule-driven findings.
AI-Driven Discovery LLM calls are logged for cost.
Draft findings flow into Self-Critique.
Refined findings flow into Fact-Check.
Grounding may inspect the live DOM to verify a finding.
Grounded findings get evidence attached.
Annotated findings feed cross-page detection.
Per-page findings flow to the issue list.
Site-wide patterns flow to the issue list.
Issues become hypotheses.
Hypotheses are scored and prioritized.
Top issues feed the executive summary.
Recommendations feed the executive summary.
Summary goes to review prep.
Recommendations go to review prep.
Issues go to review prep.
Review packet is shown to the consultant.
Override edits update the review state.
Approved audit produces the stakeholder one-pager.
Approved audit produces the consultant report.
Stakeholder content is rendered as PDF.
Consultant content is rendered as PDF.
Stakeholder content is shown in the dashboard.
Consultant content is shown in the dashboard.
Reproducibility snapshot is saved in the database.
Findings are written to the database.
Final PDF is saved in object storage.
Screenshots are saved in object storage.
Every AI evaluation call is logged for cost.
Every self-critique call is logged for cost.
Every page-understanding call is logged for cost.
Workflow steps emit activity logs.
Retry and recovery emit activity logs.
Workflow emits live progress events.
Dashboard subscribes to live events.
Approved audits viewed in the dashboard archive into the outcomes store.
Every consultant edit during review feeds the edit-pattern tracker.
Outcome archive feeds the improvement service.
Edit patterns feed the improvement service.
Approved heuristic changes flow back into the rule library — the learning loop closes.
